message:
feat(ops): add telemetry ingest pipeline with backpressure, attribution, and lifecycle tracking

Storage — telemetry ingest pipeline (951 lines changed):
- SearchEventRecord and ResourceSampleRecord typed ingest records with
  field-level validation (non-empty IDs, phase enum, u64-to-i64 safe
  conversion for FrankenSQLite INTEGER columns).
- ingest_search_events_batch(): Atomic batch ingest with INSERT OR IGNORE
  dedup on event_id PK. Returns OpsIngestBatchResult with inserted/
  deduplicated/failed counts, queue depth, and write latency.
- Backpressure: AtomicUsize pending_events counter with configurable
  threshold. Batches exceeding the threshold receive SearchError::QueueFull
  with current pending count and capacity.
- upsert_resource_sample(): ON CONFLICT(project_key, instance_id, ts_ms)
  DO UPDATE for idempotent resource metric snapshots.
- OpsIngestionMetrics: Lock-free atomic counters for total_batches,
  total_inserted, total_deduplicated, total_failed_records,
  total_backpressured_batches, pending_events, high_watermark,
  total_write_latency_us. All accessible via ingestion_metrics().
- with_transaction(): Generic BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK wrapper for multi-
  statement atomicity, since FrankenSQLite lacks Connection::transaction().
- Shortened all 11 index names (e.g., idx_instances_project_heartbeat →
  ix_inst_pk_hb) to work around FrankenSQLite btree page overflow when
  sqlite_master entries exceed the 4096-byte page size.
- 8 comprehensive tests including idempotency, backpressure, validation
  rollback, schema bootstrap, and resource upsert.

State — instance attribution and lifecycle types:
- InstanceAttribution: Wraps host_adapter::resolve_host_project_attribution()
  with project_key_hint, host_name_hint, resolved_project, confidence_score,
  reason_code, and collision tracking.
- ProjectAttributionResolver: Stateless resolver that delegates to the
  core host adapter with deterministic source-precedence tiebreaking.
- InstanceLifecycle: Full lifecycle state machine with LifecycleState enum
  (Discovered/Healthy/Degraded/Unresponsive/Terminated), transition history
  via LifecycleSignal, and severity classification.
- FleetSnapshot extended with attribution and lifecycle HashMaps.
- 22 tests covering attribution resolution, lifecycle transitions, signal
  severity ordering, and edge cases.

DataSource — trait extension:
- attribution() and lifecycle() methods added to DataSource trait.
- MockDataSource::sample() expanded with attribution and lifecycle data
  for all sample instances (cass-001, xf-001, amail-001).

Fleet Screen — adapt to extended FleetSnapshot:
- Replace explicit HashMap::new() field initialization with
  ..FleetSnapshot::default() to accommodate new attribution and lifecycle
  fields without updating every test constructor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
